providers.label: D

evidence: Converter Foil topics returned strong on-topic hits: Hindalco Q4 earnings, Novelis Oswego USD 84M loss, GIADEC-Danieli €300m foil plant
Whey Ingredients/Northern Europe on-target with Arla-DMK merger S&P rating, FrieslandCampina UK £10m revenue jump
But CLEANING SUPPLIES/New England padded with Terex, Standex, Thermo Fisher dividends — wrong industry; 'Providence sues fire truck makers' is off-topic
CONSTRUCTION/Europe includes TikTok Singapore layoffs and Türk Telekom smartphones — FP-entity
Heavy EIN Presswire/openPR market-report SEO padding across Packaging Boxes, Cheese, Cocoa
All 28 topics returned articles including harder ones like BOPET/CN, HR SERVICES/Mid Atlantic (19), IT & TELECOM/Northern Africa (19)
Only Molasses/Oceania was thin (1 article)
Header no-date: 0, stale: 0; e.g., PROFESSIONAL SERVICES/LATAM entries dated 2026-07-04, 2026-07-03
Converter Foil Hindalco summary contains concrete numbers: 'Rs 1,000 crore Eternia revenue by FY29... Rs 40,000 crore aluminium windows market'
Business Wire press-release summaries are clean and actionable (e.g., APS Cholla natural gas conversion)
EIN Presswire market-size boilerplates less useful
Header errors: 0, dup: 2 (very low across 426 articles)
URLs from mainstream sources: reuters, businesswire, prnewswire, economictimes

providers.verdict: Broad coverage with fresh dates and mostly real sources, but polluted by PR-newswire market-report filler and occasional wrong-entity matches.

providers.label: E

evidence: Molasses/Oceania precisely on target: FSC harvest delays cost $3.5M weekly, MOGA cane price dispute, Westpac warning on Fiji sugar viability
Converter Foil topics hit Vedanta Q1 632,000 tonnes output, Japan Q3 aluminium premium $395/t, Alcoa-Hillside deal
But Film/CN includes 'PE塑料周评' (polyethylene weekly), '苯乙烯' (styrene) reports — FP-entity, wrong meaning of 'film'
BOPET/CN includes broad PET產業鏈 daily quote lists and Available CRAN Packages by Date of Publication — FP-not-news
All 28 topics returned 40+ articles each; total 1337 articles
Even niche topics (Cocoa/Asia Pacific 44, Whey/Northern Europe 46) fully populated
Header no-date: 0, stale: 0; dates cluster around 2026-07-01 to 2026-07-05 across topics
Molasses/Oceania summaries include actionable data ('$3.5 million weekly' harvest delay costs)
OIL/FUEL/South-eastern Asia B50 rollout summary specifies '29 fuel terminals', 'B50 by 2028'
Some Chinese-language entries left untranslated (BOPET/CN 'PET商品报价动态'), reducing English usability
Header errors: 0, dup: 19 (highest dup count of the run)
e.g., BOPET/CN 4 dups, PAPER/Northern Europe 7 dups, PE Resins/US 4 dups
URLs appear valid across sina, mysteel, reuters, agfundernews

providers.verdict: Widest, freshest catch of the run, but the Chinese-language leakage and 'film=plastics film' confusion create noticeable false-positive noise.

providers.label: B

evidence: Whey Ingredients/Northern Europe returned tight on-topic items: Ingredion-Tate & Lyle acquisition, IFF Food Ingredients sale to CVC, DCA whey benchmark launch
LOGISTICS/Western Africa hit target with CEVA 'Scaling Logistics in West Africa' and Business Insider Africa Hormuz rerouting article
Some FP-not-news: CLEANING SUPPLIES/New England includes Fortune Brands, Unilever, Nyco, ISSA homepages tagged '2026-07-05' with generic corporate blurbs
PE Resins/US mixed — Syntex America blockade piece is on-topic; Suke Plastics and gulei-petrochemical.com product pages are catalogue FPs

Only 15 of 28 topics have any articles; BOPET/CN, CONSTRUCTION/Europe, Film/CN, HR SERVICES/Mid Atlantic, Molasses/Oceania, PACKAGING/Oceania, PAPER/Northern Europe, Packaging Boxes/IN, SOLVENTS|Northern Europe, IT & TELECOM/Northern Africa etc. returned 0 items
Total 47 articles across all topics — very thin (e.g., BOARD/Eastern Asia = 1, Converter Foil = 1)
Header: no-date: 0, stale: 0 across all 47 articles
Dates cleanly present, e.g. Ingredion-Tate & Lyle 2026-06-10, IFF-CVC 2026-05-29
Whey Ingredients items provide deal size, structure, and equity stake (e.g., 'US$4.3 billion... 10% minority stake' in IFF-CVC)
LOGISTICS/Western Africa CEVA entry summarises inland depots, barge solutions, free zone infrastructure clearly
A few thin supplier-catalogue entries (Nyco, ISSA) admit they are 'not news'
Header errors: 0, dup: 0
URLs check out (ft.com, reuters.com, cvc.com, ingredionincorporated.com)
Self-flags marginal entries as non-news rather than pretending

providers.verdict: Cleanest dataset in the run but severely narrow — great when it fires, silent on more than half the topic list.

providers.label: C

evidence: OIL/FUEL/South-eastern Asia hits on-topic: 'Indonesia begins B50 biodiesel rollout at 29 fuel terminals' (ANTARA), 'Asia battles rising uneven toll of energy crisis' (Reuters)
EXTERNAL MANUFACTURING/Northern America mostly market-report landing pages (Techaeris, Saddle Creek, Business Research Company) — thin
PACKAGING/Oceania and LIQUIDS/Southern Africa returned single generic market-size reports (Leeline Package, Chemical Research Insight) — FP-not-news
14 of 28 topics returned 0 articles including BOARD/Eastern Asia, BOPET/CN, CLEANING SUPPLIES/New England, Whey Ingredients returned 3
189 errors across queries — errors dominate the response
Header: no-date: 0, stale: 0 — all 28 articles have valid recent dates like 2026-06-08 White House tariff action
Whey Ingredients Guardian piece includes concrete data: '€1,700 per tonne... 50% rise since start of 2026'
Converter Foil/Northern America summary of White House tariff action names Section 232 specifics
Some entries are one-line market-report abstracts (Leeline Package: 'Australia accounts for nearly 100% of corrugated box production')
Header errors: 189 — vast majority of queries failed
e.g., BOARD/Eastern Asia 10 errors/0 articles, Cheese/US 7 errors/0 articles, LABORATORY/Africa 10 errors/0 articles
0 duplicates, URLs look valid

providers.verdict: When it actually returns something it's clean and dated, but 189 errors gut trust and coverage — service reliability is broken.

providers.label: A

evidence: BOARD/Eastern Asia dominated by TradingView Reuters newswire pages like 'Exosens Secures €140 Million In EIB Financing' and 'KPMG's self-destruction' — wrong entity/region
CLEANING SUPPLIES/New England returned Mexico Cleansers IndexBox and China Disinfecting Wipes — wrong region entirely
Film Distribution/Midwest returned generic Hollywood/CinemaCon coverage like 'Motion Picture Association Boss Says AI Can Bolster Storytelling' with no Midwest angle
Molasses/Oceania returned 'W.Africa Crude-Exxon offers Hungo again' and TABLE-Serendip Holdings — completely unrelated
All 28 queried topics returned articles, e.g. 92 for BOARD/Eastern Asia, 100 for PROFESSIONAL SERVICES/LATAM
Even niche topics like Converter Foil and Whey Ingredients returned 60+ items
Header states no-date: 2142 of 2142 articles — 100% no-date across all topics
Every article across BOARD, BOPET, CLEANING SUPPLIES etc. carries [NO DATE ⚠] flag
Cleaning Supplies/New England summaries are navigation boilerplate: 'Featured Industry News CleanLink Minute CleanTips Buyer's Guide'
PAPER/Northern Europe TradingView entries show only 'Image 22 Image 23 Image 24 Dec 22, 2025 Reuters' fragments
Some ICIS and Reuters items (e.g., 'Syngenta sees strong growth in China as Q1 sales rise') do have usable summaries
Header errors: 0
35 duplicates flagged across topics (e.g., CONSTRUCTION/Europe 4 dups, PAPER/Northern Europe 5 dups)
URLs appear real (tradingview.com, reuters.com, icis.com)

providers.verdict: Massive volume undone by 100% missing dates and heavy off-topic contamination — unusable for time-sensitive strategy work.

ranking_rationale.1st: E: broadest coverage with clean dates and strong story specifics; wins on precision-adjusted volume despite semantic slips on 'Film|CN' and 19 dups.
ranking_rationale.2nd: D: near-universal coverage and clean recency, edged out only by E's higher precision on niche topics — dragged down by PR-newswire market-report filler.
ranking_rationale.3rd: B: highest precision and cleanest trust profile of the run, but only 15/28 topics answered and just 47 total articles caps its usefulness.
ranking_rationale.4th: A: enormous volume but every article is undated and off-topic contamination is pervasive, triggering recency and precision caps.
ranking_rationale.5th: C: 189 errors mean half the queries never returned; what it does return is clean, but reliability collapse forces the trust cap and last place.
